positive_contracts_covered: existing Wave27 manifest, evidence, and repair-policy reuse
deterministic defect normalization and contiguous-span grouping
single-frame identity and visual repair routing
2-5 frame short-span routing and greater-than-5/persistent rerun escalation
source manifest, temporal evidence, defect report, and policy SHA256 binding
candidate manifest hash/sequence and target before-after delta audit
negative_contracts_covered: invalid defect taxonomy, index, binding, duplicate, or artifact hash
target timestamp, shot, character, or camera drift
candidate frame-count, dimension, timestamp, or artifact tamper
contradictory planning and candidate schema states
existing output preservation and publish-failure temp cleanup
before-after visual, runtime, temporal acceptance, and promotion flags remain false
